text: We are currently carrying out work to improve the usability of our search function. This may cause search results to be incomplete. We anticipate this issue will be resolved in the coming hours.

Meeting highlights from the Pharmacovigilance Risk Assessment Committee (PRAC) 4-7 May 2026 PRAC carried out its broad range of responsibilities for managing the risks associated with medicine use EU recommendations for 2026/2027 seasonal flu vaccine composition Annual updates to virus strains ensure vaccines stay effective EMA launches new advisory group on vaccine confidence International panel of high-level experts will support EMA’s efforts to strengthen trust in vaccines New pilot to support development of ‘breakthrough’ medical devices Enhanced regulatory support and priority access to scientific advice for developers Meeting highlights from the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) 20-23 April 2026 Five new medicines recommended for approval; another nine medicines recommended for extension of their therapeutic indications New medicine to reduce triglycerides in adults with familial chylomicronaemia syndrome Redemplo provides new treatment option for patients with a high unmet medical need EMA business hours over King's Day and Labour Day, 27 April and 1 May The European Medicines Agency's (EMA) office is closed for King's Day in the Netherlands on Monday 27 April and for Labour Day on Friday 1 May Meeting highlights from the Committee for Veterinary Medicinal Products (CVMP) 14-16 April 2026 Outcomes of the Committee for Veterinary Medicinal Products (CVMP) meeting EMA recommends authorisation of first veterinary vaccine using RNA technology Nobivac NXT HCPChFeLV helps protect against common, highly contagious infections in cats Meeting highlights from the Pharmacovigilance Risk Assessment Committee (PRAC) 7-10 April 2026 PRAC agrees on communication to healthcare professionals about cases of severe liver injury with epilepsy medicine.
